info.name: CRMS Mobile API Collection
info.description: Collection of all CRMS Mobile API endpoints for testing and development in Bruno or Postman.

request.description: device_id is required and must be 2-255 characters. device_name is optional, but when sent must be 2-255 characters.

body.raw:
{
  "notes": "Checking in from site",
  "device_id": "device_uuid_123",
  "device_name": "Google Pixel 8",
  "latitude": 11.016844,
  "longitude": 76.955832,
  "accuracy": 12,
  "speed": 0,
  "activity": "still",
  "is_gps_on": true,
  "is_mock_location": false,
  "battery_percentage": 80,
  "recorded_at": "2026-07-13T09:00:00+05:30"
}

{
  "project_id": 1,
  "user_id": 1,
  "title": "Fix foundation leaks",
  "description": "Repair cracks in basement layout.",
  "type": "general",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "pending",
  "due_date": "2026-07-15",
  "estimated_hours": 4,
  "is_important": true
}

{
  "project_id": 1,
  "employee_id": 1,
  "title": "Fix foundation leaks - Completed",
  "description": "Crack sealing is done.",
  "type": "general",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "completed",
  "due_date": "2026-07-15",
  "estimated_hours": 4,
  "logged_hours": 3.5,
  "is_important": true
}

{
  "project_id": 1,
  "employee_id": 1,
  "title": "Fix foundation leaks - Completed",
  "description": "Crack sealing is done.",
  "type": "general",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "completed",
  "due_date": "2026-07-15",
  "estimated_hours": 4,
  "logged_hours": 3.5,
  "is_important": true
}

request.description: Returns only the authenticated employee/user wallet history. user_id and employee_id filters are ignored for this list endpoint.

response.name: Success - Dropdown Options

formdata.description: Optional image file. Same as web form field `image`. Max 2MB.

response.name: Success - Created With Web Form Fields
response.body:
{
  "message": "Tool / material created successfully.",
  "tool_material": {
    "id": 1,
    "item_type": "material",
    "sku": "SAND-001",
    "name": "River Sand",
    "unit": "CFT",
    "date": "2026-07-21",
    "image_path": "tools-materials/material.jpg",
    "image_url": "http://localhost/crms/storage/tools-materials/material.jpg",
    "description": "Created from API",
    "opening_quantity": 100,
    "opening_rate": 10,
    "opening_amount": 1000,
    "reorder_level": 10,
    "office_stock_quantity": 100,
    "site_stock_quantity": 0,
    "stock_quantity": 100,
    "stock_amount": 1000,
    "is_low_stock": false,
    "active_status": true,
    "balances": [
      {
        "label": "Office",
        "quantity": 100,
        "amount": 1000
      }
    ]
  }
}

formdata.description: Optional image file. Same as web form field `image`. Max 2MB.

response.name: Success - Updated With Web Form Fields
response.body:
{
  "message": "Tool / material updated successfully.",
  "tool_material": {
    "id": 1,
    "item_type": "material",

body.raw:

  "tool_material_id": "{{tool_material_id}}",
